description: Align and stack the sequence of five dithered FITS exposures located in ~/AstroImages/dithered_sequence/ to create a clean, sharp master image. These images show the same star field, but the telescope drifted between exposures, causing the stars to shift. Produce a final aligned and stacked FITS image where the stars are round and sharp, and save the result to ~/AstroImages/processed/master_stack.fits.
